cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22.1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
link_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/..)
add_library( native-lib SHARED src/main/cpp/native-lib.cpp src/main/cpp/DuplexEngine.cpp )
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(native-lib PRIVATE /W4 /WX)
else()
    target_compile_options(native-lib PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra -pedantic)
endif()
target_compile_options(native-lib PRIVATE -O3 -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only)
find_library( log-lib log)
set (OBOE_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../..)
add_subdirectory(${OBOE_DIR} ./oboe-bin)
include_directories( ${OBOE_DIR}/include ${OBOE_DIR}/src )
target_link_libraries( native-lib oboe ${log-lib})
target_link_options(native-lib PRIVATE "-Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384")
